hotel_name: Mercure Pau Palais des Sports Hotel

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Staff was extra friendly and accommodating
reviews.negatives: It really doesn't have anything close by

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.positives: The staff was very nice and helpful, the room is clean.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay in a beautiful hotel. Kind staff.
reviews.positives: Free parking with electric charge. Staff was nice. Pool was nice (shame for the lack of seats). Breakfast was good (except the coffee).
reviews.negatives: Not enough beach seats at the pool, although there was the space for it. Breakfast coffee was not good at all.
